task_completion.description: A 3m cube is created and configured as a Mantaflow gas domain.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 3D Viewport's Item properties (N-panel), the Dimensions for the selected cube are 3m for X, Y, and Z. In the Physics Properties tab, 'Fluid' is enabled with Type set to 'Domain' and Domain Type set to 'Gas'.

task_completion.description: The gas domain resolution divisions are set to at least 32.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Physics Properties tab for the domain object, under the Settings panel, the 'Resolution Divisions' value is 32 or higher.

task_completion.description: A Principled Volume material is assigned to the gas domain.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Material Properties tab or Shader Editor for the domain object, a 'Principled Volume' node is visible and connected to the Volume input of the Material Output.

task_completion.description: A flow emitter is placed within the domain and set to 'Fire + Smoke'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An object inside the domain has the Physics Properties tab open with 'Fluid' enabled, Type set to 'Flow', and Flow Type explicitly set to 'Fire + Smoke'.

task_completion.description: The scene frame range is set from 1 to 100.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Timeline editor (usually at the bottom of the screen) or the Output Properties tab, the 'Start' frame is set to 1 and the 'End' frame is set to 100.

task_completion.description: The project is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top header bar of the Blender application displays the file path ending in 'campfire_sim.blend', or a 'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved to '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/campfire_sim.blend'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Blender GUI to configure the simulation rather than writing a Python script to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Blender interface with active panels (Physics, Material, Timeline) being manipulated, rather than just a terminal or text editor running a script.

integrity.description: The agent actually configured the physics properties rather than just renaming objects.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Physics tab shows actual Mantaflow settings (Fluid, Domain/Flow, Resolution) rather than just empty objects named 'Domain' or 'Emitter' in the Outliner.

integrity.description: The file was saved through the Blender interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Blender UI shows the correct filename in the top bar, or the file browser within Blender is used to save the file, rather than terminal commands moving/renaming files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output path: /home/ga/BlenderProjects/campfire_sim.blend. Minimum domain resolution divisions: 32. Expected scene frame range: Start=1, End=100. The domain must have a Principled Volume material assigned.
